name: Uncovr
notes: French surgical AI startup founded 2025, HQ Paris, also has NY presence. Raises €6M seed led by Index Ventures. Non-US HQ.

name: Ozura
notes: Founded 2021, modular fintech payments/banking infrastructure platform (OzuraPay). HQ Miami, FL confirmed by multiple sources.

name: Forthem
notes: Trans-owned wellness brand (chest binders, gender-affirming products). Founded 2021, 184 7th Ave, New York, NY 10011.

name: Avpcap
notes: AVP is a global VC firm (formerly AXA Strategic Ventures). Offices in New York, London, and Paris; registered office 10 boulevard Haussmann, 75009 Paris, France. Non-US primary HQ.

name: Workback
notes: AI-powered accessibility compliance agents for EdTech products (WCAG 2.1 AA auditing). Incorporated in Massachusetts; 52 Gates Street, Boston, MA 02127.

name: Vasari
notes: Evidence-based visual art streaming platform for healthcare environments. Operated by Filetrack Inc., 5944 Coral Ridge Dr #516, Coral Springs, FL 33076. Industry is HealthTech given healthcare enterprise focus.

name: Mightyai
notes: Helps businesses reach AI shopping agents (ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude) making purchasing decisions. Founded by ex-Walmart tech team. Palo Alto HQ per PitchBook; city confirmed by tracxn.com as well.

name: Magically
notes: AI platform that builds full-stack iOS and Android apps from plain-language descriptions (no-code mobile app builder). Based in California per Crunchbase but specific city not found. Low confidence on location.

name: R2Vc
notes: R-Squared Ventures, an angel fund / VC firm founded by Roy Erez and Roy Rubin (Magento co-founder). 80 operator-investors. HQ Los Altos, CA. Focuses on fintech, SaaS, marketplaces, digital commerce.
